response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills, leadership in open-source projects, and experience with distributed systems and cloud technologies. However, his background lacks explicit focus on C++ (a key requirement) and large-scale cloud compute platforms, with most of his recent work centered on full-stack development and AI tooling.
strengths: Proven technical leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentoring (workshops, talks).
Diverse experience with distributed systems, infrastructure, and DevOps (e.g., Kubernetes, CI/CD, microservices).
Strong problem-solving skills and adaptability across languages/stacks (e.g., Dlang, Node.js, TypeScript).
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (only 1 year at National Instruments, 2014–2015).
Primary expertise in full-stack/web development, not cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture.
No explicit mention of production-level cloud architecture or balancing short/long-term needs.
